content.en:
"The Ka Ye Wisdom Body is just an ordinary innate multi-dimensional Dao body, with a total of three levels of realm, and now I have cultivated to the limit of the third layer of Dacheng, which is already its limit!"

Ye Tian thought secretly.

However, his Wumu Body and the Ten Dimensional Celestial Body had a total of five realms, and he could continue to cultivate.

It's just that if you want to cultivate the body of the black mother and the body of the ten dimensions to the fourth layer, this is almost impossible, and only after cultivating to step into the fifth realm can you hope to raise the body of the black mother and the body of the ten dimensions to the fourth layer.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian successively cultivated the Wumu Body and the Ten-Dimensional Celestial Body to the third layer of the Dacheng realm, which also made his strength reach an extremely terrifying level.

......

"Forty thousand extradimensional rule realms!"

Ye Tian felt that his progress was getting slower and slower, the scales of this sixth realm multi-dimensional life form were not of much help to the "Seven Five Zero", and he continued to comprehend, I was afraid that even if he comprehended another 100 million extradimensional eras, it would be difficult to improve to the realm of fifty thousand extradimensional rules.

Do you want to leave here?

Ye Tian was a little unwilling.

He looked at the multi-dimensional life form of the sixth realm, and then at the assimilated extradimensional creatures, and had an idea in his heart.

Perhaps, he could try to snatch something from this sixth realm multidimensional lifeform.

Just by contemplating a few patterns, there is such a gain, and if you take something from the sixth realm multi-dimensional life form, wouldn't it be an even greater gain?

"Fight!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Wow!

He went all out, condensed the 40,000 Dao extra-dimensional rule realm into a Dacheng-level extra-dimensional rule realm, compressed and protected himself to the limit, and then urged a multi-dimensional mastery to directly kill the past.

Bang!!!!!

Those assimilated extradimensional creatures moved one by one to stop Ye Tian.

After these extra-dimensional creatures were assimilated, they have been subjected to the baptism of the sixth realm's multi-dimensional life breath, which is equivalent to receiving the tempering of the breath day and night, how terrifying the physical body is.

At this time, their strength was definitely not weaker than the powerhouses of the Fifth Heaven Pass, and the best of them were even comparable to the Sixth Heaven Pass, and there was even an existence that was comparable to the Seventh Day Pass.

But Ye Tian was already not afraid of them.

Kill!

The sand and gravel robbed the light, the blade of the thunder, and waited for the outbreak of multi-dimensional mastery in the four realms of one gate.

Puff puff!!!

One by one, the fourth-realm extra-dimensional creatures were directly annihilated, whether it was the fifth day pass or the sixth day pass, they were far from his opponents, and they were easily killed.

Soon, the extra-dimensional creature comparable to the seventh day pass made a move and fought with Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian's strength is no longer comparable to the past, his current strength is almost invincible in the seventh day pass, and he is very close to the combat power of the eighth day pass.

This extra-dimensional creature doesn't know the will to be peerless, or even the four realms and multi-dimensional realms, it's just that the physical body is strong enough to make up for everything.

"The will of the ninth dimension is peerless, the Sky Robbery Blade, kill me!"

A terrifying will turned into the Celestial Blade and slashed at the extradimensional creature.

But the opponent's defense was too terrifying, no matter how Ye Tian attacked, it was difficult to break the defense, even if it was a ninth-dimensional will mastery like the Firmament Tribulation Blade, it could only cause a little injury.

Over time.

The other extra-dimensional creatures, Ye Tian has already killed them all, and only this extra-dimensional creature remains.

The opponent's strength was not Ye Tian's opponent, but his defense was too terrifying, making it difficult for Ye Tian to bombard him.

In desperation, Ye Tian could only forcibly suppress the other party, so that the other party could not resist.

Then, another of his replica bodies came over and ran directly to the side of the Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life, touching the Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life.

The assimilation effect here is even greater, but Ye Tian can still hold on for a while.

Ye Tian tried to snatch something from the Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life, but the corpse of the Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life was too tough, and he was like a piece of tofu touching steel.

And he felt that a terrifying force was awakening, and once it broke out, his replica body would inevitably be annihilated.

Time was too late, he had to take something, or he would have to try this time in vain.

Finally.

He found that there was a wound on the body of this sixth realm multidimensional life, and this wound should be the reason for the fall of this sixth realm multidimensional life.

And there is a ball of blood at the wound, which can also be said to be a drop of blood.

"Take it!"

Just as he was taking the ball of blood, an invisible force swept in.......

Rumble!

The small half of his body was directly annihilated.

"Gotta hurry up!"

Ye Tian fled quickly, but that mysterious power had already awakened.

In an instant, a voice like thunder resounded through the void.

Ye Tian's Ka Ye Wisdom Body, Wu Mu Body, and Ten Dimensional Celestial Body all erupted to the extreme, and the other copy body defended with all its might.

However.

An invisible force descended, directly shattering the replica body.

However, fortunately, at the last moment, he used the power of the ten-dimensional celestial body to travel through the dimension and leave.

......

Ye Tian, who only had one head left, came out of the fifth dimension, and carried that ball of blood.

Subsequently.

Another replica body came over to answer and took away this mass of blood, and as for the replica body with only one head left, it was naturally disbanded directly.

"That mysterious power is so terrifying, I guess it only drew a trace, but I didn't expect to bombard my two replica bodies, if I continue to want to get more good things, more replica bodies will be bombarded"

Ye Tian guessed what means the Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life had arranged before death to prevent others from disturbing him.

Anyway, he's got this ball of blood, and it's worth it.

"Go back!"

Ye Tian returned to the territory of the four thousand five hundred, and then began to study this mass of blood.

He silently comprehended the power in this mass of blood, and soon saw a complete extradimensional realm, or 4.5 extradimensional rule world.

It's too mysterious, it's too profound, and it contains infinite power.

Suddenly.

He actually sensed a wisp of sword light from the depths of this mass of blood, this sword ray seemed to bombard everything, and even Ye Tian's soul will touched it, as if it was about to be annihilated by it.

Airplanes!

A small sword light slashed directly at Ye Tian's soul will.

At the critical moment, Ye Tian performed the Ninth Dimension Will Peerless Technique-Sky Tribulation Tower.

While!

The sword slashed at the Firmament Tower, making the Firmament Towers tremble slightly, but it did not smash the Firmament Tower.

After all, this is just a small wisp of sword, and it is just a sword light left in the blood, maybe only one billionth of the power of the original real sword, and if you want to kill him, you naturally can't do it.
